name: NotificationAPI
description: NotificationAPI — developer-first multichannel notification infrastructure (email, SMS, push, in-app, Slack) with a no-code template editor and SDKs for web/mobile/backend.

seo.title: NotificationAPI — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: NotificationAPI: NotificationAPI — developer-first multichannel notification infrastructure (email, SMS, push, in-app, Slack) with a no-code template editor and

when_to_use: Sending multichannel transactional alerts (email, push, SMS) from one SDK
Building in-app notification center with no-code template editor
Delivering Slack notifications for B2B workflow events
Managing notification preferences across web and mobile from one API

pros: Developer-first API across email, SMS, push, in-app
Preference center and user opt-outs handled
cons: Newer vendor — less battle-tested at scale
Ecosystem smaller than Knock or Courier
Advanced journey logic limited so far
review.verdict: Pragmatic notification infra for engineering teams; pick over Knock/Courier on price, not maturity.
review.best_for: Engineering teams needing one API for multichannel transactional notifications
review.not_for: Marketing-led teams wanting deep campaigns and analytics
